hypothesis: If a synthesis-planning workflow integrating thermodynamic reaction-network design, cellular automata reaction simulations, and ML feasibility with commercial pricing/availability data is applied to commercially accessible precursors in the Ca–Si–O–C–N–H–Al–B space at 800–1600°C, then it will identify recipes that experimentally yield Ca2SiO4 with higher economic efficiency than baseline selection because the combined models capture likely reaction pathways and incorporate cost constraints.
